title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.710 - Certain parties have standing to initiate expedited eviction proceedings
text:
441.710.  Certain parties have standing to initiate expedited eviction proceedings. — Any of the following parties shall have standing to bring a civil action pursuant to sections 441.710 to 441.880:
  (1)  A landlord; or
  (2)  A prosecuting attorney of the jurisdiction in which the leased property is located.
(L. 1997 H.B. 361)
